Against IR Iran, they want to release Salah early and let Marmoush arrive as the second wave; the risk is IR Iran can turn fouls, counters, and Taremi's craft into chances.
keyInformation.away: IR Iran are a streetwise counterattacking side with experienced forwards who understand tournament margins, led by Mehdi Taremi, Sardar Azmoun, and Alireza Jahanbakhsh. Against Egypt, they want to draw contact, slow the rhythm, and then find Taremi or Azmoun around the box; the risk is Egypt can turn one loose pass into a Salah-led break.

h2h.summary: Colombia and Portugal have never met in a verified senior men's international. This is their first head-to-head meeting.

home.note: Colombia's most explosive wide threat, dangerous attacking the box from the left and finishing moves himself.

home.name: James Rodriguez
home.note: The experienced creator who still connects Colombia's attack, especially when the match slows near the area.

home.name: Luis Suarez
home.note: A central striker arriving off a heavy club scoring season, giving Colombia a direct target in the box.

away.note: The headline finisher and reference point in the box, still chasing the World Cup piece missing from his resume.

away.name: Bruno Fernandes
